# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: three-tier-vpc
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL
    description: VPC network for three-tier application with auto-created subnets

- name: allow-internal
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 10.128.0.0/9
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - 0-65535
    - IPProtocol: udp
      ports:
      - 0-65535
    - IPProtocol: icmp
    description: Allow internal communication between auto-created subnets

- name: allow-ssh-iap
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 35.235.240.0/20
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - 22
    description: Allow SSH via Identity-Aware Proxy

- name: allow-health-checks
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
    description: Allow Google Cloud health checks

- name: allow-web-tier
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - 80
      - 443
    targetTags:
    - web-tier
    description: Allow HTTP/HTTPS to web tier from internet

- name: allow-app-tier
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceTags:
    - web-tier
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - 8080
      - 8443
    targetTags:
    - app-tier
    description: Allow web tier to app tier communication

- name: allow-db-tier
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceTags:
    - app-tier
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - 3306
      - 5432
    targetTags:
    - db-tier
    description: Allow app tier to database tier communication

- name: deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    denied:
    - IPProtocol: all
    description: Deny all other ingress traffic

- name: deny-all-egress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: EGRESS
    destinationRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    denied:
    - IPProtocol: all
    description: Deny all egress traffic by default

- name: allow-egress-internal
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: EGRESS
    destinationRanges:
    - 10.128.0.0/9
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
    - IPProtocol: udp
    - IPProtocol: icmp
    description: Allow egress to internal subnets

- name: allow-egress-google-apis
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: EGRESS
    destinationRanges:
    - 199.36.153.8/30
    - 199.36.153.4/30
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - 443
    description: Allow egress to Google APIs

- name: allow-egress-internet-web
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: EGRESS
    destinationRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - 80
      - 443
    sourceTags:
    - web-tier
    - app-tier
    description: Allow web and app tiers to access internet for updates

outputs:
- name: networkName
  value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.name)
- name: networkSelfLink
  value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
